title: Senior Doctor - Siemens Healthineers India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Siemens Healthineers India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
